capability.name: Physics Rigid Bodies
capability.description: This capability enables physical simulation of solid objects with constant shape and size as well as collision detection and response between objects, dynamic motion simulation including gravity, forces, and constraints, and integration with physics engines for real-time and offline simulation. A rigid body is an idealized solid object that maintains a constant shape and size regardless of the forces acting upon it, meaning the distance between any two points within the rigid body remains constant during simulation.

requirements.name: mesh-collision-api
requirements.message: MeshCollisionAPI may only be applied to UsdGeom.Mesh prims and requires CollisionAPI on the same prim.

requirements.name: rigid-body-no-instancing
requirements.message: Rigid bodies cannot be part of a scene graph instance.

requirements.name: rigid-body-mass
requirements.message: Rigid bodies _or_ their descendent collision shapes should have a mass specification.

requirements.name: rigid-body-no-nesting
requirements.message: Rigid bodies can not be nested unless xformOp reset xform stack is used.

requirements.name: rigid-body-capability
requirements.message: Assets must contain at least one rigid body

requirements.name: rigid-body-schema-no-skew-matrix
requirements.message: Rigid bodies have to be UsdGeomXformable prims without skew matrix.

requirements.name: collider-mesh
requirements.message: The Mesh Collision API can only be assigned to Mesh Prims.

requirements.name: rigid-body-multibody-capability
requirements.message: Assets must contain at least two rigid bodies

requirements.name: collider-capability
requirements.message: Colliding Gprims must apply the Collision API.

requirements.name: rigid-body-schema-application
requirements.message: Rigid bodies have to be UsdGeomXformable prims.

requirements.name: collider-non-uniform-scale
requirements.message: The collision shape scale must be uniform for the following geometries: Sphere, Capsule, Cylinder, Cone & Points.

requirements.name: rigid-body-detailed-mass
requirements.message: Rigid bodies _or_ their descendent collision shapes may have detailed mass properties including density, center of mass, and inertia tensor.

requirements.name: invisible-collision-mesh-has-purpose-guide
requirements.message: Invisible collision meshes must have their purpose attribute set to 'guide' to be properly excluded from rendering.

requirements.name: nested-rigid-body-mass
requirements.message: Rigid bodies must have an explicit mass specification, or their descendant collision shapes must have non-zero volume to allow mass auto-computation. Nested rigid body subtrees are excluded from the traversal.

requirements.name: no-nested-rigid-body-without-joint
requirements.message: Rigid bodies should not be nested unless they are connected by a joint.
